compliance.stopConfirmation: You have been unsubscribed from Vergeo5 marketing messages. Order updates will still be sent.
compliance.startConfirmation: You are subscribed to Vergeo5 updates. Reply STOP to opt out.

order_confirmed.body: Your Vergeo5 order {order_reference} is confirmed. Total {total}. Track: {track_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

payment_received.body: {trust_narrative} Order {order_reference}. Reply STOP to opt out.
payment_received.trust_narrative: Your {amount} is held safely by Vergeo5 until delivery.

order_shipped.body: Your Vergeo5 order {order_reference} has shipped. {tracking_info} Reply STOP to opt out.

order_ready_pickup.body: Your Vergeo5 order {order_reference} is ready for pickup. {pickup_details} Reply STOP to opt out.

order_delivered.body: Your Vergeo5 order {order_reference} was delivered. Share your experience: {review_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

vendor_new_order.body: New order {order_reference} on Vergeo5: {product_title} × {quantity}. Confirm in the vendor app.

otp_login.body: Your Vergeo5 login code is {otp_code}. It expires in 10 minutes. Do not share this code.

event_cancelled.body: Vergeo5 event "{event_title}" on {event_date} has been cancelled. {refund_detail} Reply STOP to opt out.
event_cancelled.refund_pending: Your payment refund is being processed by Vergeo5.
event_cancelled.refund_none: No payment was found on your account for this event.

event_schedule_changed.body: Vergeo5 event "{event_title}" schedule has changed. New date: {event_date}. Check your tickets in the app. Reply STOP to opt out.

otp_login.body: Vergeo5 code: {otp_code}. Expires in 10 min. Do not share.

review_request.body: How was your Vergeo5 order {order_reference}? Leave a review: {review_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

abandoned_cart_recovery.body: You left items in your Vergeo5 cart. Complete checkout: {checkout_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

kyc_nudge.body: Your Vergeo5 vendor verification is waiting. Finish in the vendor app to start selling.

low_stock_alert.body: Vergeo5: {title} is low ({stock_qty} left). Restock in the vendor app.

payout_failure_alert.body: Vergeo5 payout failed: {vendor_name} {amount} ref {lenco_reference}. Check admin.

event_schedule_changed.body: Vergeo5: "{event_title}" rescheduled to {event_date}. Check the app for details.

receipt.subject: Your Vergeo5 receipt — order {order_id}
receipt.body:
Thank you for your payment.

Order: {order_id}

Amount: K{amount}

Funds are held safely by Vergeo5 until delivery.

approved.subject: Your Vergeo5 vendor verification is approved
approved.body:
Good news — your vendor identity verification is approved.

You can now publish listings and receive payouts on Vergeo5.

rejected.subject: Your Vergeo5 vendor verification needs attention
rejected.body:
We could not approve your vendor verification.

Reason: {reason}

Please resubmit your documents from the vendor app.

review_request.body: How was your Vergeo5 order {order_reference} from {vendor_name}? Share your review: {review_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

abandoned_cart_recovery.body: You still have items waiting in your Vergeo5 cart. Pick up where you left off: {checkout_url} Reply STOP to opt out.

kyc_nudge.body: Your Vergeo5 vendor application has been waiting 48 hours. Complete verification to start selling.

low_stock_alert.body: Low stock on Vergeo5: {title} has {stock_qty} units left (threshold {threshold}). Update stock in the vendor app.

payout_failure_alert.body: Payout failure alert: {vendor_name} — {amount} (ref {lenco_reference}). Review in admin.
